Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Punitive Damages Allegations And Related Prayers From Complaint; Request For Judicial Notice
Off Calendar May-25-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS THE COCA-COLA COMPANY, COCA-COLA OASIS, INC., CHINA BASIN BALLPARK COMPANY LLC, SAN FRANCISCO BASEBALL ASSOCIATES L.P., and, DELPHI PRODUCTIONS, INC. Motion to Strike Punitive Damages Allegations and Related Prayers from Complaint. Appearances: Joseph Poppen, Esq. Meis & Associates (415) 981-4612 appearing for Plaintiff and opposing party; Karen L. Moore, Esq. Low, Ball, & Lynch (415) 981-6630, appearing for defendants and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to strike denied, 10 days leave to answer. Order signed in open Court. (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
